msk.cluster.configurationinfo.Arn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MSK configuration to use. For example, `arn:aws:kafka:us-east-1:123456789012:configuration/example-configuration-name/abcdabcd-1234-abcd-1234-abcd123e8e8e-1`.

msk.cluster.configurationinfo.Revision.Description: The revision of the Amazon MSK configuration to use.
